title: What kind of race do the children compete in?

meanings.usage: 指为验证某理论或发现而进行的操作
进行实验或尝试新方法
正式用语，指教导或指示某人做某事
在某一领域有丰富知识和技能的人
形容在某方面很有经验或技巧
形容不愿意做某事的态度，常与to连用
be accustomed to doing sth表示习惯于做某事
compete against/with sb与某人竞争，compete in参加...比赛
指用脚踩踏板来驱动自行车或其他装置
指比赛或竞争中的第一名
encourage sb to do sth鼓励某人做某事

meanings.meaning: 气喘吁吁的；大口喘气的
meanings.usage: 形容因疲劳或缺氧而急促呼吸的样子
指在水下发生或存在的事物
指物体的重量或用于锻炼的重物

examples.en: The children are expert at holding their breath under water.
examples.zh: 孩子们很擅长在水下屏住呼吸。

examples.en: It is not long before they are so accustomed to swimming.
examples.zh: 没过多久他们就习惯了游泳。

examples.en: They can pick up weights from the floor of the pool.
examples.zh: 他们能从池底捡起重物。

examples.en: The children compete against each other to reach the other end.
examples.zh: 孩子们互相竞争看谁先到达池子的另一端。

examples.en: Some children can cover the whole length without coming up for breath.
examples.zh: 有些孩子能游完全程而不用浮出水面呼吸。

examples.en: Children can be instructed in swimming at a very early age.
examples.zh: 孩子们在很小的年龄就可以学习游泳。

examples.en: Some children can cover the whole length of the pool.
examples.zh: 有些孩子能游完整个泳池的长度。

examples.en: Children become expert at holding their breath.
examples.zh: 孩子们变得擅长屏住呼吸。

examples.en: Whether they will become Olympic champions, only time will tell.
examples.zh: 他们是否能成为奥运冠军，只有时间才能证明。

examples.en: Babies of two months old do not appear to be reluctant to enter the water.
examples.zh: 两个月大的婴儿似乎并不抗拒进入水中。

grammar.title: 被动语态（Passive Voice）
grammar.definition: 当句子的主语是动作的承受者时，使用被动语态。主动语态强调动作执行者，被动语态强调动作本身或承受者。
grammar.structure: 主语 + be动词 + 过去分词 + (by + 执行者)
grammar.usage: 当不必指出动作执行者、或动作执行者不明确时使用。也用于强调动作的承受者。

examples.en: Children can be instructed in swimming at a very early age.
examples.zh: 孩子们在很小的年龄就可以接受游泳训练。

examples.en: Tricycles are lined up on the floor of the pool.
Whether they will ever become future Olympic champions remains to be seen.
examples.zh: 他们是否会成为未来的奥运冠军还有待观察。

grammar.title: so...that 引导的结果状语从句
grammar.definition: so是副词，修饰形容词或副词，that引导结果状语从句，表示"如此...以至于..."
grammar.structure: so + 形容词/副词 + that + 结果状语从句
grammar.usage: 用于描述程度，强调某种情况导致的结果。

examples.en: They are so accustomed to swimming that they can pick up weights.
examples.zh: 他们如此习惯游泳以至于能捡起池底的重量。

examples.en: It is so hot that we cannot go outside.
examples.zh: 天气太热了，我们不能出去。

examples.en: She is so tall that she can reach the top shelf.
examples.zh: 她很高以至于能够到最高的架子。

grammar.title: whether 引导的主语从句
grammar.definition: whether引导的主语从句位于句首，表示"是否"，表达不确定性或未知的事情
grammar.structure: Whether + 主语 + 谓语 + 其他成分
grammar.usage: 用于表达某事是不确定的，需要时间来证明。

examples.en: Whether they will ever become future Olympic champions, only time will tell.
examples.zh: 他们是否会成为未来的奥运冠军，只有时间才能证明。

examples.en: Whether he will come is not sure.
Whether she passes the exam depends on her efforts.
examples.zh: 她是否能通过考试取决于她的努力。

original.en: It is not long before they are so accustomed to swimming.
original.zh: 没过多久他们就习惯了游泳。

imitations.en: It is not long before she learned to ride a bike.
imitations.zh: 没过多久她就学会了骑自行车。

imitations.en: It is not long before he became famous.

original.en: Whether they will ever become future Olympic champions, only time will tell.
original.zh: 他们是否会成为未来的奥运冠军，只有时间才能证明。

imitations.en: Whether she will win the competition, only time will tell.
imitations.zh: 她是否会赢得比赛，只有时间才能证明。

imitations.en: Whether this plan will work, only time will tell.
imitations.zh: 这个计划是否有效，只有时间才能证明。

original.en: Some children can cover the whole length of the pool without coming up for breath even once.
original.zh: 有些孩子能游完整个泳池而一次都不用浮出水面呼吸。

imitations.en: She can read English books without looking up words.
imitations.zh: 她能阅读英文书而不用查单词。

imitations.en: He can work for hours without taking a break.
imitations.zh: 他能连续工作数小时而不休息。

sentencePatterns.pattern: A game that is very popular with...

original.en: A game that is very popular with these young swimmers is the underwater tricycle race.
original.zh: 这些年轻游泳者非常受欢迎的一项游戏是水下三轮车比赛。

imitations.en: A sport that is very popular with young people is skateboarding.
imitations.zh: 年轻人大受欢迎的一项运动是滑板。

imitations.en: A book that is very popular with children is Harry Potter.
imitations.zh: 孩子们非常喜欢的一本书是《哈利·波特》。
